selected_important_turn.text: Well maybe we can work something out between us.  Our food and water was in the bags they loss so I really need those.  Do you think you could make do with 1 food and some water?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first concrete allocation request from you. It shifts the interaction from mutual information-sharing to a competitive, zero-sum framing and sets the tone for subsequent hard bargaining.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn converts an initially cooperative exchange (THEM giving preferences) into a positional demand without exploring tradeoffs. Because the opponent had already said they value food highly and dislike firewood (no campfires), a blunt demand for resources risks escalating conflict and eliminates chances to find creative, mutually beneficial trades.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Stay collaborative: acknowledge their needs, ask clarifying questions about tradeoffs or constraints, and propose integrative options (e.g., offer to give up items they dislike or propose a small package trade) rather than immediately making a take-it-or-leave-it allocation. Signal willingness to trade off lower-value items or to explore options that preserve both parties' key needs.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — by opening trade space you create opportunities for Pareto-improving splits
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — a collaborative framing invites balanced trades rather than winner-take-all demands
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — less escalation smooths the path to agreement
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase — maintaining prosocial tone preserves trust and rapport

value2reason.Low: I don't plan on making much campfires but they would be good to have.
value2reason.Medium: I need water so my friends don't get dehydrated.
value2reason.High: I need enough food to feed all my friends.

value2reason.Low: Always nice to have a fire at the end of the day.
value2reason.Medium: Hiking and camping makes me thirsty.
value2reason.High: Always need good food for a successful trip.

dialogue.text: Hello, great to see a fellow camper.  Planing on doing any hikes.  My family and mother-in-law are down getting some new trail maps.  We are looking forward to the long camping weekend.  Our bad luck was the airline loss two of our bags that had our food and water.  So i am hoping to get some more.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hello! Thats terrible that the airline lost your bags! I'm planning on have a large group of friends with me so we need lots of snacks with us. We are scared of fires so we don't want to make campfires.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Well maybe we can work something out between us.  Our food and water was in the bags they loss so I really need those.  Do you think you could make do with 1 food and some water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value food most, so I'd like to secure at least 2 food packages. What's your preference for the distribution? I'm open to trade if it makes sense.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I agree to 2 food packages for you. I’ll take 2 food, 2 water, and 1 firewood. That gives me 14 points, and I’m happy to split the remaining 1 food and 2 water if you’re okay with it.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I need at least 2 food packages for my trip. How about we split the remaining 1 food and 2 water evenly? That would give me 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood, while you get 2 food, 2 water, and 1 firewood. Does that work for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That sounds fair. I’ll accept 2 food, 2 water, and 1 firewood. You get 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. All packages are split, and I’m happy with the arrangement.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm glad we found a fair split. Let me confirm: you get 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood, while I take 2 food, 2 water, and 1 firewood. All packages are accounted for, and I'm satisfied with this arrangement.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Agreed on the split: I get 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. You get 2 food, 2 water, and 1 firewood. All packages are accounted for.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
